title: fix(playground-ui): lazy-load prettier to reduce main bundle size
summary: Replaces static imports of prettier/standalone, prettier/plugins/babel, and prettier/plugins/estree in playground-ui's formatting.ts with dynamic import() calls behind a memoized lazy loader. This removes ~634KB from the main bundle (180KB gzipped) by splitting prettier into on-demand chunks loaded only when formatJSON is called. Includes error-handling that resets the cached promise on failure so retries work correctly.
maintainerNotes: Approved by abhiaiyer91 and wardpeet. CI failures are E2E Tests and Memory Tests which are unrelated to this 2-file change (only touches playground-ui formatting). Build, lint, core tests, and all other checks pass. No tests added but the change is a straightforward lazy-loading refactor with no behavioral change. CodeRabbit feedback was addressed across iterations (memoization, error cache reset). Ready to merge.
